title: 10 Inch Large Silicone Number 0 Cake Mould, Tin Pan for DIY Baking Birthday Wedding Anniversary, BPA Free, Non-Stick
features: 【High-Quality Silicone】The number cake tin mould is made of 100% food grade silicone, indeformable, reusable, safe to make various kind of food. Superior ductility, silicone baking molds can be pulled and no damaged.
【Endure High & Low Temperature】The number cake tin mould is heat resistant from -40 °F to +446°F (-40°C to 230°C).It can be used in ovens microwaves dishwashers and refrigerators

【Easy to Demould】 Easy to use, featuring a polished surface treated with nanotechnology. Simply pour the prepared cake batter into the silicone number mould, place it in the oven, and bake for the required time. After the cake has cooled, it can be easily removed.

【Multifunction】Each silicone number mould is about 10 inch long and 1.86 inch deepth, perfect for making birthday cakes, anniversary cakes, holiday cakes, and more. These molds are fantastic for making Candy/ fondant/ sugarcraft/ jello/ cake decorating/ butter/ resin/ polymer clay.

【Easy Cleaning and Storage】Wash silicone cake baking pan with warm soapy water or place them in the dishwasher to clean. The silicone number mould is highly flexible and can be folded or rolled to save space.
description: Product Description Size Details: · Number 0: Liquid Volume - 1.4L · Number 1: Liquid Volume - 1.3L · Number 2: Liquid Volume - 1.5L · Number 3:Liquid Volume - 1.4L · Number 4: Liquid Volume - 1.6L · Number 5: Liquid Volume - 1.4L · Number 6/9 (same item): Liquid Volume - 1.3L · Number 7: Liquid Volume - 1.5L · Number 8: Liquid Volume - 1.35L Notes: Usage tips: 1.Please wash the silicone number cake baking mould thoroughly with warm water before use. Brush a layer of cooking oil before pouring in the cake batter to facilitate demolding. 2.It is recommended not to fill it too full, please keep the amount within two-thirds to ensure the desired shape. Avoid overbaking the cake to prevent burning. 3.When not in use for a long time, place it in a cool place and avoid direct sunlight. 4.Do not use the knife or other sharp instruments on the silicone mold, not weight, pulling.Do not touch open flames. 5.Due to the difference between different monitors, the picture may not reflect the actual color of the item.
